relations.note: Both govern chart appearance; color logic constrains data element coloring within the container.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Keep chart containers on-system and legible.
rules.rule_text: Charts must be clean and easy to scan, consistent with the system: the container uses uniform rounded corners (chart.container.radius = 12px), a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel (chart.panel.fill), and a Brand Blue (#00529b) rounded header bar (chart.header_bar.fill).

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only
effect.subject: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a)

quotes: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only
**Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.** Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.

rules.intent: Preserve a consistent, hierarchy-driven chart palette that reserves warm accents for emphasis.
rules.rule_text: Chart color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b, chart.primary.color) and Sky Blue (#358CCB, chart.data.secondary_color) are dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator data uses neutral gray.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Keep the data visualization visually warm and on-brand.
rules.rule_text: Bars and chart icons must use rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops).

quotes: ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Standardize chart headline typography and accent rule.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines set in Agenda (print) or Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS (chart.headline.case), Brand Blue (#00529b, chart.headline.color), with a thin Gold (#ffc60a, chart.headline.rule_color) rule beneath.

quotes: large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath
Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.

rules.intent: Enforce a clear figure-first visual hierarchy in stat callouts.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts are large and bold — the % figure is the hero (chart.statistical_callout.figure.weight) — with supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath (chart.statistical_callout.supporting_text.weight).

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Prevent footnotes from competing with primary chart data.
rules.rule_text: Chart footnotes are noticeably smaller and clearly separated from the primary data.
